headline: Is Synopsys (SNPS) Still Reasonably Priced After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you are wondering whether Synopsys at around US$412 per share is a fair deal or starting to look stretched, you are not alone. The stock is down about 5.7% over the last week, 5.8% over the past month, 14.1% year to date and 7.5% over the past year, although it is still up 10.8% over three years and 81.1% over five years. Recent coverage has focused on Synopsys as a key software provider in chip design, with investors weighing its role in long term semiconductor trends against current...
